commit.subject: LU-930 misc: update more email addresses
commit.message:
LU-930 misc: update more email addresses

Update my email address in a few other places, and also include
the lustre-devel mailing list as a failsafe for the future.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Change-Id: I15a9471de0d7da5232345443fb981a90ec0469bf
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/62916
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
